subject: Sociology
title: Caste in India
description: A 60-second lesson on Caste in India.

hook.text: He's a software engineer earning six figures, but his last name reveals his caste. Some families reject him instantly.

buildup.text: India's caste system is thousands of years old, dividing society into hierarchical groups by birth.

discovery.text: Dalits, once called untouchables, were excluded from temples, wells, and schools. Millions still face discrimination.

twist.text: India banned caste discrimination in 1950. But social practice lags far behind law. Caste shapes marriage and hiring.

climax.text: Caste proves that stratification survives legal abolition. Structural change requires more than just new laws.

punchline.text: Laws change faster than societies. Caste proves it.

quiz.question: What does India's caste experience show about stratification?
options: Legal abolition alone doesn't end deep social inequality
Caste has no effect in modern India
